rules: Every image/audio asset needs source, author, license, and commercial-use status before release.
Unknown or placeholder assets must be replaced or formally approved.
Every gameplay animation cycle must have a generated contact sheet before it is approved.

stage-01-bg.author: unknown
stage-01-bg.notes: Active Stage 1 scene plate because it meets the current visual quality target better than prototype tiles. Gameplay still comes from Tiled-style object layers. Source/license must be documented or replaced before release.

metro-tiles.author: project prototype
metro-tiles.notes: Prototype/editor helper tileset only. It must not be used as the primary visible stage art until replaced with production-quality tiles/prefabs.

player-sheet.author: unknown
player-sheet.notes: Manual frame rectangles are defined in /data/animations.json. Requires contact-sheet approval for every cycle.

enemy-sheet.author: unknown
enemy-sheet.notes: Walk cycle was manually replaced during prototype work. Requires ongoing contact-sheet review.

stage-01-metro-arcade-bg.source: Local generated China long background promoted from public/assets/backgrounds/Temp/long/Asia/China/ChatGPT Image Jul 8, 2026, 01_20_21 AM.png
stage-01-metro-arcade-bg.author: project-generated asset provided by Moncef Benboubakeur
stage-01-metro-arcade-bg.notes: Active China long level plate. Needs responsive screenshot review and release licensing decision before production approval.
